title: Field of Man-Sized Holes
description:
The sudden sight of a massive field, [jitter]gouged with large outlines of bodies[/jitter], stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

[sine][orange]It's perfect...[/orange][/sine]

options.title: Resist
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Normality[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

conditions: At least one card in your deck must be enchantable by Perfect Fit
notes:
This event offers two thematically distinct choices with rich narrative payoffs:

[gold]**If you choose 'Enter Your Hole':**[/gold] You enchant a selected card with [purple]Perfect Fit[/purple]. The event then reveals: 'It's a snug fit, but you squeeze yourself into the hole... The further you go, the [purple]darker it becomes[/purple]. Eventually, you see a [gold]faint light[/gold] grow brighter and reveal the other side. You step out unchanged, but now understand the [green]intimate secrets of life[/green].'

[gold]**If you choose 'Resist':**[/gold] You select [blue]2[/blue] cards to remove from your deck and gain [red]Normality[/red]. The event concludes with existential doubt: 'You walk past all the holes, even the one carved [orange]perfectly in your shape[/orange]... Why didn't I go inside? What would have happened? Have I been in that hole before? Who made these holes? [red]What is... who... where?[/red]'
